---
name: "📓 Propose a guest Build Log"
about: "Suggest a real engineering decision from something you've shipped, for a guest log."
title: "Build Log proposal: [short title]"
labels: ["build-log-proposal"]
assignees: []
---

**What did you build?**
One or two sentences. A link if it's public.

**What's the specific decision or trade-off you want to write about?**
Not "how I built X" — the actual fork in the road. e.g. "why I rolled my own auth instead of using a library," "why I chose polling over webhooks," "the bug that taught me to stop trusting timezone libraries."

**Draft outline**
3-5 bullet points of what the log would cover.

**Anything that didn't work / what you'd do differently**
This is usually the most useful part of a log — don't skip it.
